calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARNCES:
No appearance by Dr. Craig Ladow, Plaintiff/Respondent
Minh Nguyet Thi Tran, Defendant/Appellant, appears in pro per

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Appellant has signed the Stipulation to Use Judge Pro Tem.

Minh Nguyet Thi Tran testifies under oath and is assisted by a Vietnamese Interpreter
Mi Huynh.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission. No evidence is retained.

JPT David May, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
